items.label: Enterprise

transforms.code:
# Define database name
    dbName = "mes_core"
    
    # Define the query with join and parameterized LineID (PostgreSQL)
    query = """
        SELECT pc.productcode AS \"ProductCode\", pc.description AS \"Description\", pcl.enable AS \"Enable\", pcl.\"TimeStamp\" 
        FROM productcode pc
        LEFT JOIN productcodeline pcl
        ON pc.id = pcl.productcodeid
        WHERE pcl.lineid = ?
    """
    try:
        # Execute the query with LineID from component property (adjust path as needed)
        lineID = 1  # Adjust based on your Perspective property path
        data = system.db.runPrepQuery(query, [lineID], dbName)
        
        # Convert dataset to JSON for Perspective compatibility
        json_data = system.dataset.toPyDataSet(data)
        result = [
            {
                col: row[col]
                for col in data.getColumnNames()
            }
            for row in json_data
        ]
        return result
        
    except Exception as e:
        system.util.getLogger("ScriptLogger").error("Query failed: {}".format(str(e)))
        return []
